reviews.review_description:
I'm not an ugly hearted person but I will  state facts. The game isn't worth your money or time regardless of the preview video of it. Because it's not fully developed and isn't worth playing. Also people I tried getting a refund for it the same day I bought it; once I figured out that it wasn't fully developed. However, meta quest refused the refund  immediately. The total for the game was $7.52 sadddd again save yourself the trouble by not purchasing this game. With that being said I'm highly dissatisfied and would like a refund ASAP.
Please remember any games that state early access is a scam.
